rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VERA TUCKER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Order Approving Final Distribution On Grounds Of Extrinsic Fraud Or Mistake
rulings.Rulings: Motion is tentatively denied. There is no proof of service that Ms. Carr has been served with this motion. If moving party is able to present proof of service, then a hearing is required on August 21, 2013 to address the following issues: 1. Why Mr. Tucker did not understand the assignment of interest document when it is one page long, in ordinary wording, with his signature on the same page as the substantive content? 2. Why did Vera Carr represent that she was the daughter on various documents in the adminstration proceeding, including the April 3,2002 supplement she executed under the penalties of perjury that she was Vera Tucker's daughter? 3. Whose name are the property tax notices issued under? 4. When did Mr. Tucker learn of the title issue? Any party who wishes to argue the matter must notify the court (415 551 3720) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on August 20, 2013, the day before the scheduled hearing date.
